2606.06252.title: Closing the Loop on Latent Reasoning via Test-Time Reconstruction
2606.06252.paper_summary: Recent work moves intermediate reasoning from natural-language traces into latent or cache-level representations to reduce token overhead and avoid a discrete communication bottleneck. However, this shift also removes a key advantage of textual reasoning: intermediate states are no longer inspectable, making it difficult to determine whether a latent state still preserves the constraints of the original query. As a result, latent reasoning typically operates in an open loop, where a latent state is produced and consumed without an input-anchored fidelity check. We propose ReLAT (Reconstruction-Guided Latent Reasoning At Test Time), a self-supervised test-time training method that closes this loop using the query itself as the reference. Our key observation is that if a latent state faithfully represents a query, the query should be recoverable from it; if the query cannot be recovered, the latent state has lost task-relevant information. ReLAT operationalizes this principle by constructing a differentiable Question -> Latent Thought -> Question cycle and optimizing query reconstruction loss through the latent thought before answer generation. This anchors opaque latent computation to the problem specification it is supposed to represent. Across mathematical reasoning, knowledge QA, and code generation benchmarks on the Qwen family, ReLAT consistently improves over single-model inference, text-based collaboration, open-loop latent collaboration, and alternative test-time training objectives. On Qwen3-8B, ReLAT raises AIME 2024 accuracy from 56.7% to 73.3%, a 16.6-point gain over the strongest open-loop latent baseline.
2606.06252.paper_summary_zh: 最近的研究將中間推理從自然語言痕跡轉移到潛在或快取級別的表示，以減少標記開銷並避免離散通信瓶頸。<lb/>然而，這一轉變也去除了文本推理的一個關鍵優勢：中間狀態不再可檢查，這使得難以確定潛在狀態是否仍然保留原始查詢的約束。<lb/>因此，潛在推理通常在開放循環中運行，潛在狀態的產生和消耗不進行基於輸入的忠實性檢查。<lb/>我們提出了 ReLAT（重建引導的潛在推理測試時），這是一種自我監督的測試時訓練方法，通過使用查詢本身作為參考來關閉這一循環。<lb/>我們的關鍵觀察是，如果潛在狀態忠實地表示了一個查詢，那麼應該可以從中恢復該查詢；如果查詢無法恢復，則潛在狀態已經失去了與任務相關的信息。<lb/>ReLAT 通過構建可微分的問題 -> 潛在思維 -> 問題循環來實現這一原則，並在生成答案之前通過潛在思維優化查詢重建損失。<lb/>這將不透明的潛在計算錨定到它應該表示的問題規範上。<lb/>在數學推理、知識問答和 Qwen 系列的代碼生成基準上，ReLAT 始終優於單模型推理、基於文本的協作、開放循環潛在協作和其他測試時訓練目標。<lb/>在 Qwen3-8B 上，ReLAT 將 AIME 2024 的準確率從 56.7% 提高到 73.3%，比最強的開放循環潛在基線提高了 16.6 個點。
2606.06252.author: Xiaopeng Yuan et.al.
2606.06252.authors: Xiaopeng Yuan, Haibo Jin, Ye Yu, Peng Kuang, Lijun Yu, Yushun Dong, Haohan Wang
